arguments.argument: Human autonomy is the bedrock of moral agency. Even if the hidden patterns reduce suffering, they strip individuals of their right to self-determination. To preserve a free society, we must prioritize transparency and informed choice over paternalistic interventions, no matter how well-intentioned.
